title: Whitespace is your *friend*
body: Resist the urge to fill every pixel. Generous spacing makes content breathable, scannable, and more professional.

title: Limit your *fonts*
body: Two fonts maximum. One for headings, one for body. More than that creates visual chaos and kills readability.

title: Contrast creates *hierarchy*
body: If everything is bold, nothing is bold. Use size, weight, and color to guide the eye to what matters most.

title: Align *everything*
body: Sloppy alignment is the #1 amateur tell. Use grids, snap to guides, and keep consistent margins throughout.

title: Which principle changed your *designs* the most?
subtitle: Save this for your next project
